overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a red and tan outfit exploring a space station interior. The character walks through warmly lit industrial corridors with equipment and viewports showing space outside, then transitions through a doorway into a botanical atrium with a glass ceiling revealing stars.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial equipment bay with viewport windows

events.description: character begins walking along curved corridor path following yellow cable line
passing under brighter overhead light fixtures creating lens flare effect

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor, passing equipment and storage containers while following the curved path

entered.detail: metal utility cart with wheels and equipment racks
tall rectangular windows showing black space outside with distant lights
thick yellow cable running along the floor following the corridor curve
large industrial pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
large metal spool with wound cable sitting on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a warmly lit industrial corridor with metal flooring and equipment scattered about. Large viewport windows on the right show the blackness of space outside. A thick yellow cable traces the curved path along the floor, and various storage containers and industrial carts line the walls.

events.description: approaching and passing through industrial doorway into brighter atrium space
emerging from dim corridor into brighter space with different lighting temperature

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway threshold into a new area with visible plants and different architecture

entered.detail: large metal door frame with industrial detailing marking the transition between zones
large trees in planters visible as the character enters the new space
brighter overhead lighting fixtures illuminating the new area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a large industrial doorway, transitioning from the equipment bay into a new area. The lighting becomes brighter and large potted trees become visible. The viewport windows and yellow cable of the previous corridor are left behind as the character enters the threshold.

events.description: character stops walking and looks upward at the glass ceiling
camera pans up to reveal glass ceiling with stars visible through it

agents.ego_description: standing in the atrium looking up at the glass ceiling and around at the plants

entered.detail: large glass ceiling panels revealing starry space sky above with structural supports
mature tree in large planter with green foliage
safety railings for upper level walkway
bushes with red and green foliage in planters

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious botanical atrium with a high glass ceiling revealing stars and space outside. Large potted trees and flowering plants fill the area. The character stops walking and looks up at the glass skylight, observing the contrast between the industrial metal architecture and the natural vegetation below the starry sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit industrial corridor into a luminous, star-lit botanical atrium. It begins by trailing a character through a curved hallway of metal flooring and scattered equipment, where large viewports reveal the blackness of space and a thick yellow cable traces the path along the floor. As the character approaches a large industrial doorway, the scene shifts from the enclosed equipment bay into a brighter environment where the first glimpses of potted trees appear. The camera then expands into a spacious atrium filled with flowering plants and towering greenery beneath a high glass ceiling. Finally, the character comes to a halt and looks upward, contrasting the surrounding industrial metal architecture with the vast starry sky visible through the skylight.
